author: Codex deterministic subagent

scope.selection_rule: Exact durable company/organization/person-like entity duplicates only; broad committees, departments, authorities, program categories, ambiguous initials, facilities, municipalities, and parent/subsidiary agency cases were skipped.

proposed_aliases.canonical_name: Halmar International LLC / Railworks Joint Venture
proposed_aliases.reason: Same durable contractor identity. Both records name Halmar International LLC/RailWorks Joint Venture or a punctuation-only variant, both use contractor typing, and both describe the Penn Station Access design-build contractor / HRJV.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Alias is absent from data/identity-overrides/merges.json entity aliases, absent from visible prior codex identity prep notes, and not present in do-not-merge. This is not a broad agency, department, committee, or program label.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same durable financial institution identity. The alias record is typed as trustee and cites 'Trustee JPMorgan Chase'; the target record has the same display name plus JPMorgan Chase / JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A. aliases across multiple source records.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Alias is absent from merges.json entity aliases, absent from visible prior prep notes, and not in do-not-merge. Trustee role is contextual, not a separate entity identity.

proposed_aliases.canonical_name: Kew Gardens Flea and Craft Market, Inc.
proposed_aliases.alias_name: Kew Gardens Flea and Craft Market, Inc.
proposed_aliases.reason: Same durable not-for-profit/organization identity. Both records carry the exact corporate name and source evidence identifies it as the permittee/operator for Kew Gardens flea market activity.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Alias is absent from merges.json entity aliases, absent from visible prior prep notes, and not in do-not-merge. Organization vs not-for-profit organization typing is compatible.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same durable company identity. Names differ only by comma punctuation, both records use the Louis Berger Group Inc. identity, and the target has stronger source-backed context including the LBG abbreviation and WSP acquisition note.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Alias is absent from merges.json entity aliases, absent from visible prior prep notes, and not in do-not-merge. Acquisition by WSP is context only; the merge is for the same Louis Berger entity.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same durable engineering firm identity. Both records use the exact display name and the shared alias entity_m-and-j-engineering-pc; target evidence explicitly expands the firm as M & J Engineering PC with M&J abbreviation context.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Alias is absent from merges.json entity aliases, absent from visible prior prep notes, and not in do-not-merge. Company and certified minority-owned business descriptions are compatible identity-level descriptions.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same durable rail-testing vendor identity. Both records have the exact corporate name and shared normalized alias entity_pro-traxx-ultrasonic-rail-testing-inc; target evidence names Pro-Traxx as a vendor/proposer.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Alias is absent from merges.json entity aliases, absent from visible prior prep notes, and not in do-not-merge. Company/vendor typing is compatible.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same durable company identity. Both records use the exact company name; target evidence identifies Queens Ballpark Company LLC as licensor and carries the stronger two-source cluster.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Alias is absent from merges.json entity aliases, absent from visible prior prep notes, and not in do-not-merge. No agency or committee ambiguity.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same durable LLC identity. Display names differ only by capitalization and comma punctuation; both records also use the normalized alias entity_rlf-ii-bassett-llc and source evidence identifies the same RLF II Bassett LLC grantor/licensor entity.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Alias is absent from merges.json entity aliases, absent from visible prior prep notes, and not in do-not-merge. The alias record id word order appears slug-derived; the source-backed display name matches the target identity.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same durable rail equipment/vendor company identity. Names differ only by comma punctuation; both records carry Siemens Mobility Inc. aliases and compatible company/vendor descriptions tied to rail systems work.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Alias is absent from merges.json entity aliases, absent from visible prior prep notes, and not in do-not-merge. Vendor role is contextual and compatible with the target company record.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same durable tenant/company identity. Both records use the exact LLC name and shared normalized alias entity_vizz-group-llc; target evidence identifies Vizz Group LLC as lessee/tenant and has a broader three-source cluster.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Alias is absent from merges.json entity aliases, absent from visible prior prep notes, and not in do-not-merge. Company/corporation typing is compatible.

commands_run: pwd && rg --files data packages wiki raw | rg '(^data/identity-overrides/merges\\.json$|^data/review_notes/|canonical|identity|entities|entity|do-not-merge|do_not_merge)'
jq '.aliases.entity | keys | length, .aliases.entity | to_entries[0:20]' data/identity-overrides/merges.json (failed expression; read-only)
ls -l data/review_notes || true && test -f data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch130-prep.json && sed -n '1,220p' data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch130-prep.json || true
jq '(.aliases.entity | keys | length) as $n | {entity_alias_count:$n, sample:(.aliases.entity | to_entries[0:5])}' data/identity-overrides/merges.json
jq exact-name duplicate grouping over data/canonical/entities.jsonl
jq entity merge alias/target temp extracts and do-not-merge probe (read-only; one expression shape failed against nested object)
rg prior identity prep aliases in data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch*.json
jq filtered exact-name duplicate grouping excluding broad committee/department/authority/program labels
for selected alias ids, jq '.aliases.entity[$id] // empty' data/identity-overrides/merges.json
rg selected alias ids across data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch*.json data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json data/identity-overrides/merges.json
jq selected record evidence extract from data/canonical/entities.jsonl
commands_not_run: No canonicalize, campaign dedup, identity-review, write, ask, schema, or ontology-normalize commands
No commands with --profile or provider settings
No edits to canonical JSONL, wiki pages, DB, LOG.md, manifest, retired submissions, submissions, or merges.json
